repo.name: Kharon Messenger
repo.description: Ephemeral E2E encrypted messenger. Self-hosted. Zero-knowledge.

apps.name: Kharon Messenger
apps.description:
Kharon is a minimalist encrypted messenger for small teams.

Messages live for 2 minutes, then vanish forever. No accounts, no phone numbers, no history, no servers you do not own.

Features:
* X25519 + XSalsa20-Poly1305 E2E encryption
* Server never sees plaintext
* Messages stored in RAM only (TTL 2 min)
* Certificate pinning
* SQLCipher encrypted contacts
* Android Keystore for keys
* No screenshots (FLAG_SECURE)
* 4 UI themes

Requires a self-hosted server. See https://github.com/webdotG/kharon-mess

en-US.description: Kharon is a minimalist encrypted messenger for small teams. Messages live for 2 minutes, then vanish forever. No accounts, no phone numbers, no history.
en-US.name: Kharon Messenger

ru-RU.description: Kharon — минималистичный зашифрованный мессенджер для небольших команд. Сообщения живут 2 минуты, потом исчезают навсегда. Никаких аккаунтов, телефонов, истории.
ru-RU.name: Kharon Messenger
